subject: 문법
textbook: 문법 연습문제 Basic / VOCA 365 Daily Test

summary.goodPoints: 문법 Q10(관계대명사 that)과 Q12(What/that 이중 구별)를 정확히 풀어냈습니다. that과 what의 기본 개념 자체는 이해하고 있습니다. 별도 어휘 시험(VOCA 365) Day 32(84%) → Day 33(90%) → Day 34(92%)로 매일 정답률이 꾸준히 상승 중입니다.
summary.badPoints: 문법 Q11에서 'said those things'의 목적어(those things)를 인식하지 못하고 불완전절로 오판하여 what을 선택했습니다. 동사 뒤 목적어 존재 여부를 정확히 파악하는 훈련이 필요합니다.
summary.priority: that/what 구별 시 '완전절/불완전절' 판별법 → 동사 바로 뒤 목적어 확인 습관화

weakAreas.note: 동사 뒤 목적어(those things)를 놓쳐 완전절을 불완전절로 오판

wrongAnswers.type: 접속사 that vs 관계대명사 what 구별
wrongAnswers.question: I can't believe ______ he actually said those things about his former colleagues.
wrongAnswers.explanation:
that vs what 핵심 구별법

that (접속사)what (관계대명사)
뒤에 오는 절완전한 절 (S+V+O/C 다 있음)불완전한 절 (S, O, C 중 하나 빠짐)
역할단순 연결 (의미 없음)'~하는 것' (= the thing that)
공식that + 완전절what + 불완전절

이 문장 구조 분석

I can't believe ______ he actually said those things about his former colleagues.

문장 성분해당 부분
주어 (S)he
부사actually
동사 (V)said
목적어 (O)those things
수식어 (전치사구)about his former colleagues

→ S(he) + V(said) + O(those things) = 3형식 완전절 → that

정답: that

I can't believe that he actually said those things about his former colleagues.

= 나는 그가 실제로 전 동료들에 대해 그런 말을 했다는 것을 믿을 수 없다.

believe의 목적어 자리에 명사절 that절이 왔습니다. that 뒤의 절은 S(he) + V(said) + O(those things)로 완전하므로 접속사 that이 정답입니다.

오답 함정 분석

학생 메모: "불완전으로 보고 what으로 쳤다", "4형식 X"

오판 과정 추적:

  1. said 뒤를 보고 → 4형식(SVOO)인지 확인 → 아님 (4형식 X ✓)
  2. 그런데 4형식이 아니라는 이유로 those things를 목적어가 아니라고 판단 → 여기서 오류 발생!
  3. 목적어가 없다고 보고 → 불완전절 → what 선택

핵심 포인트: 4형식이 아니더라도 3형식(SVO)에서 목적어는 존재합니다!

  • said + those things → 3형식의 목적어 → 완전절
  • about his former colleagues → 전치사구(수식어)일 뿐, 문장 필수 성분 아님

판별 팁: 동사 바로 뒤에 명사(구)가 오면 → 그것이 목적어! → 완전절 → that

studentAnalysis.whyChosen: 'said' 뒤의 구조를 분석할 때, 4형식(SVOO)이 아닌 것을 확인한 후 'those things'를 목적어로 인식하지 못했습니다. 전치사구 'about his former colleagues'에 시선이 분산되어 불완전절이라 판단하고 what을 선택했습니다.
studentAnalysis.errorPattern: 목적어 인식 오류 — 4형식 여부만 확인하고, 3형식 SVO의 목적어를 놓침. 동사 직후 명사구가 있어도 전치사구에 혼동되어 목적어로 인정하지 않음.
studentAnalysis.focusPoint: 동사 바로 뒤에 명사(구)가 오면 = 목적어! 'said those things' = 3형식 SVO 완전절 → that. 전치사구(about ~)는 수식어일 뿐 문장 필수 성분에 영향 없음.

conceptQuestions.title: that vs what 구별법 — 완전절/불완전절 판별 훈련
conceptQuestions.explanation:
that vs what 완벽 정리

핵심 원리: 빈칸 뒤의 절이 완전하면 that, 불완전하면 what

Step 1: 절의 필수 성분 확인
형식구조예시
1형식S + VHe arrived.
2형식S + V + CShe is kind.
3형식S + V + OHe said those things.
4형식S + V + IO + DOHe gave me a book.
5형식S + V + O + OCThey call him genius.
Step 2: 빠진 성분이 있는가?
  • S, O, C 중 하나라도 빠지면 → 불완전절 → what
  • 모두 갖추면 → 완전절 → that
Q10~Q12 비교 분석
문제절 분석완전/불완전정답
Q10The book [___] changed my perspective → 주어 역할 필요, 선행사 book 있음관계절 (선행사 O)that
Q11he said those things → SVO 완전완전절that
Q12-①[___] surprises me most → 주어 빠짐불완전절What
Q12-②nobody noticed the obvious mistake → SVO 완전완전절that
examples: I know that she is honest. (완전절: she + is + honest = SVC)
What he said was shocking. (불완전절: said의 목적어 없음)
The fact is that we need more time. (완전절: we + need + more time = SVO)
I don't understand what makes him angry. (불완전절: makes의 주어 없음)
exampleSentences: 나는 그녀가 정직하다는 것을 안다 → I know that she is honest.
그가 말한 것은 충격적이었다 → What he said was shocking.
사실은 우리에게 더 많은 시간이 필요하다는 것이다 → The fact is that we need more time.
나는 무엇이 그를 화나게 하는지 이해하지 못한다 → I don't understand what makes him angry.
conceptQuestions.confusionPoints:
자주 헷갈리는 포인트

  1. 전치사구에 속지 마세요!
    said those things about his colleagues → 전치사구는 수식어! those things가 목적어 → 완전절 → that
  2. 4형식이 아니어도 목적어는 존재합니다!
    3형식 SVO에서도 V 바로 뒤 명사(구) = 목적어
  3. what = the thing(s) that
    what은 '선행사 + 관계대명사'를 합친 것. 앞에 이미 명사가 있으면 what 사용 불가 (→ that/which 사용)
  4. 주어 자리가 빈 경우
    _____ surprises me → 주어 없음 → What (the thing that)

practiceProblems.sentence: I am certain ______ she passed the final exam.
practiceProblems.explanation: she(S) + passed(V) + the final exam(O) = 완전절 → that

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ he said at the meeting shocked everyone.
practiceProblems.explanation: said(V)의 목적어 없음 (at the meeting은 전치사구) = 불완전절 → What

practiceProblems.sentence: We believe ______ the project will be completed on time.
practiceProblems.explanation: the project(S) + will be completed(V) + on time(수식어) = 완전절 → that

practiceProblems.sentence: Tell me ______ happened last night.
practiceProblems.explanation: happened(V)의 주어 없음 = 불완전절 → what

practiceProblems.sentence: I don't understand ______ makes this machine so expensive.
practiceProblems.explanation: makes(V)의 주어 없음 = 불완전절 → what

practiceProblems.sentence: He claimed ______ he had never seen the document before.
practiceProblems.explanation: he(S) + had seen(V) + the document(O) = 완전절 → that

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ the teacher wrote on the board was too small to read.
practiceProblems.explanation: wrote(V)의 목적어 없음 (on the board는 전치사구) = 불완전절 → What

practiceProblems.sentence: Everyone agreed ______ the new policy was fair and reasonable.
practiceProblems.explanation: the new policy(S) + was(V) + fair and reasonable(C) = 완전절 → that

practiceProblems.sentence: I can't imagine ______ life would be like without the internet.
practiceProblems.explanation: be like(V)의 보어 없음 = 불완전절 → what (what ~ would be like = ~이 어떨지)

practiceProblems.sentence: She insisted ______ everyone attend the graduation ceremony.
practiceProblems.explanation: everyone(S) + attend(V) + the ceremony(O) = 완전절 → that (insist that + 동사원형: 당위의 should 생략)

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ you need right now is a good night's sleep.
practiceProblems.explanation: need(V)의 목적어 없음 = 불완전절 → What

practiceProblems.sentence: The real problem is ______ we don't have enough funding for the project.
practiceProblems.explanation: we(S) + don't have(V) + enough funding(O) = 완전절 → that

practiceProblems.sentence: I was disappointed by ______ the committee finally decided.
practiceProblems.explanation: decided(V)의 목적어 없음 = 불완전절 → what

practiceProblems.sentence: It seems ______ the morning train has been delayed again.
practiceProblems.explanation: the train(S) + has been delayed(V) = 완전절 → that

practiceProblems.sentence: ______ she bought for her mother turned out to be a beautiful necklace.
practiceProblems.explanation: bought(V)의 목적어 없음 (for her mother는 전치사구) = 불완전절 → What

practiceProblems.sentence: The scientist finally proved ______ the old theory was completely wrong.
practiceProblems.explanation: the old theory(S) + was(V) + completely wrong(C) = 완전절 → that

practiceProblems.sentence: Nobody noticed ______ he quietly left the room during the long speech.
practiceProblems.explanation: he(S) + left(V) + the room(O) = 완전절 → that (Q11과 유사 패턴!)

practiceProblems.sentence: I wonder ______ caused the sudden power outage last night.
practiceProblems.explanation: caused(V)의 주어 없음 = 불완전절 → what

practiceProblems.sentence: She was genuinely surprised ______ her students had organized a farewell party.
practiceProblems.explanation: her students(S) + had organized(V) + a farewell party(O) = 완전절 → that

practiceProblems.sentence: I need to figure out ______ went wrong with the entire experiment.
practiceProblems.explanation: went(V)의 주어 없음 = 불완전절 → what
